## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] Feature (non-breaking)

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this? Paste the commands you ran and their output. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `composer cs` passes (or I ran `composer cs:fix`)
- [ ] `composer stan` passes
- [ ] `composer test` passes
- [ ] `composer infection` passes (or score regression is justified in the PR description)
- [ ] I have added or updated tests covering my change
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation (README / inline docs)
